subdomain.description: The subdomain focus area being searched

no_matches_reason.description: If candidates array is empty, explain why no matches were found (search issues, no results, unclear queries, etc.)

search_improvements.description: Suggestions for improving search results in future subdomains (e.g., better query terms, different approaches, missing context). Only include if searches yielded poor results or required multiple attempts.

domain_filtering_recommendations.description: Recommendations for domain filtering based on search results. Only exclusions can be recommended - included domains are set by the user.

add_to_excluded.description: Domains that should be excluded to improve results

reasoning.description: Why these domain exclusions would help

candidates.description: List of candidate rows discovered for this subdomain

id_values.description: Dictionary mapping ID column names to their values

research_values.description: Optional dictionary mapping research column names to their values (populated during discovery if information found)

populated_columns.description: Optional list of column names that have data (includes both ID and research columns)

missing_columns.description: Optional list of column names that are still empty

score_breakdown.description: Breakdown of the match score into individual dimensions

relevancy.description: How well the entity matches requirements (0-1 scale)

reliability.description: How reliable the information sources are (0-1 scale)

recency.description: How recent the information is (0-1 scale)

match_rationale.description: Explanation of why this candidate received this score (1-2 sentences)

source_urls.description: URLs where information about this candidate was found
